subcodes.first_line: O daughter of the Kingdom. Thy letter dated 27 February 1910 hath arrived, and from its contents it became evident... Whatever is contrary to the teachings of Baha'u'llah is false
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه ۲۷ فبرواری ۱۹۱۰ وصول یافت و از مضمون مشهود گردید که شب و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Shrines and Holy places, @growth of the Cause
